description: Add the Project Management frontend pages: projects list page with data table, project detail page with linked tasks/milestones/progress bar, and create/edit modals. Match the exact UI/UX patterns used in the tasks and deals modules.
steps: Create app/tenant/projects/page.tsx as a server component following app/tenant/tasks/page.tsx pattern: use requireTenantCtx(), check permissions (projects.view, projects.create, projects.edit, projects.delete), query projects with owner name join, pass to a client component.

Create components/tenant/projects-data-table.tsx as a client component following the pattern in components/tenant/tasks-data-table.tsx. Show columns: Name (link to detail), Status (badge with colors: active=green, on-hold=amber, completed=blue), Owner, Start Date, End Date, Progress (progress bar showing % of linked tasks completed), Actions dropdown (edit/delete). Include a 'New Project' button that opens a create modal/dialog. Include inline status editing. Use the same DataTable, Button, Badge, DropdownMenu components.
Create app/tenant/projects/[id]/page.tsx as a server component following app/tenant/tasks/[id]/page.tsx pattern: fetch the project with milestones and linked tasks, pass to a client detail component.

Create components/tenant/project-detail-client.tsx with: (1) Header section showing project name, status badge, date range, owner. (2) Progress bar (tasks completed / total tasks percentage, styled with violet/green gradient). (3) Milestones section - simple list with title, due date, completed checkbox, ability to add new milestone inline. (4) Linked Tasks section - data table of tasks linked to this project showing title, status, priority, assignee, with ability to link/unlink tasks via a search-and-add UI. (5) Description section. Use the same card/section styling as task-detail-client or deals page.
Add app/tenant/projects/loading.tsx and app/tenant/projects/error.tsx following the same patterns as app/tenant/tasks/loading.tsx and app/tenant/tasks/error.tsx.
acceptance_criteria: app/tenant/projects/page.tsx renders a data table of projects with status badges and progress bars
Users can create a new project via a modal dialog from the list page
app/tenant/projects/[id]/page.tsx shows project detail with milestones, linked tasks, and progress bar
Users can add/remove milestones and link/unlink tasks from the detail page
All UI matches the existing CRM style: violet accents, same card borders, same button styles, same data table patterns
Plan gating is enforced - the module must be active for the tenant
verification: Run `npm run build` to confirm no TypeScript or build errors across all new page and component files
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` for final type verification
findings: All 6 files created and pass `npx tsc --noEmit` with 0 errors. Test suite results: 435 passed, 2 pre-existing failures (same ECONNREFUSED and missing tmp dir issues from FEAT-001/002). Required using explicit literal fallbacks for Record index signature access to satisfy TypeScript noUncheckedIndexedAccess. Date fields from DB needed String() conversion for string-typed client props.
